criteria_results.description: File client/src/hooks/useTouchGestures.ts exists and exports a function useTouchGestures that accepts { onTap, onDoubleTap, onLongPress } as optional callbacks and returns an object with onTouchStart, onTouchEnd, onTouchMove, onTouchCancel properties
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/hooks/useTouchGestures.ts: lines 12-92 implement the hook and return the required handlers. It handles TAP, DOUBLE_TAP, and LONG_PRESS logic correctly using refs and timers.

criteria_results.description: UIState interface in client/src/lib/types.ts contains `objectDetailsOpen: boolean`
EditorAction union in client/src/lib/types.ts contains both `{ type: 'OPEN_OBJECT_DETAILS' }` and `{ type: 'CLOSE_OBJECT_DETAILS' }` variants
initialUIState in editor-context.tsx has `objectDetailsOpen: false`, and the reducer handles OPEN_OBJECT_DETAILS, CLOSE_OBJECT_DETAILS, and clears objectDetailsOpen when SELECT_OBJECT payload is null
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx: initialUIState at line 38; reducer cases for SELECT_OBJECT (lines 156-160), OPEN_OBJECT_DETAILS (line 169), and CLOSE_OBJECT_DETAILS (line 171). The corruption at the end of the file has been removed.

criteria_results.description: ObjectRenderer.tsx calls useTouchGestures and attaches touch handlers to the inner content div (the div with transform rotate style), with onTap dispatching SELECT_OBJECT, and onDoubleTap/onLongPress dispatching SELECT_OBJECT then OPEN_OBJECT_DETAILS
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/components/editor/Canvas/ObjectRenderer.tsx: lines 55-67 (hook call) and lines 151-155 (touch handlers attached to the content div with rotation transform).

criteria_results.description: ObjectRenderer.tsx rotation handle div has an onTouchStart handler that reads e.touches[0] coordinates and registers document touchmove/touchend listeners for rotation, mirroring the existing onMouseDown logic
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/components/editor/Canvas/ObjectRenderer.tsx: handleRotationTouchStart implemented at lines 105-135 and attached to the rotation handle div at line 147.

criteria_results.description: MobileBottomBar.tsx mode state type is 'list' | 'edit' | 'details', a useEffect reacts to uiState.objectDetailsOpen to set mode to 'details', and when mode === 'details' the component renders PropertiesPanel
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/components/editor/MobileBottomBar.tsx: mode state updated (line 21), useEffect for mode transition (lines 27-35), and PropertiesPanel rendering in details mode (lines 160-164).

criteria_results.description: MobileBottomBar 'details' mode header has a back button that dispatches CLOSE_OBJECT_DETAILS (not SELECT_OBJECT null), so the user returns to 'edit' mode without losing the selection
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/components/editor/MobileBottomBar.tsx: handleBackToList at lines 37-43 dispatches CLOSE_OBJECT_DETAILS when in details mode. The button at line 64 uses this handler.

suggestions: Consider adding 'passive: false' to the touch handlers in useTouchGestures if preventDefault is needed later to improve responsiveness, though current implementation is correct for standard scrolling behavior.
